title: Flutter Web Masterclass
description: An intensive workshop on building responsive Flutter web applications with modern UI principles.

title: Advanced State Management
description: Deep dive into Provider, Riverpod, and Bloc to scale your enterprise applications effortlessly.

title: UI/UX Pro Design Thinking
description: Learn to design breathtaking, conversion-focused user interfaces with Material 3 guidelines.

title: Firebase Authentication Patterns
description: Secure your apps using best practices with Firebase Auth, OAuth, and custom claims.

title: Fullstack Dart with Serverpod
description: Explore writing server-side logic in Dart and sharing models across backend and frontend seamlessly.

title: Animations & Micro-interactions
description: Bring your app to life with custom implicit and explicit animations to delight users.

title: CI/CD for Mobile Apps
description: Automate your deployments using GitHub Actions and Fastlane to quickly ship to the stores.

title: Performance Profiling
description: Find and eliminate jank in your Flutter apps by mastering the DevTools timeline and memory profiler.

title: GraphQL and Flutter
description: Integrate robust GraphQL clients into your Flutter applications with caching strategies.

title: Accessibility Deep Dive
description: Ensure your app is usable by everyone. Learn Semantics, contrast rules, and screen reader testing.

title: Testing Strategies
description: A comprehensive look at unit, widget, and integration testing for unbreakable codebases.

title: Building Desktop Apps
description: Migrating and adapting mobile UI to feel native on Windows, macOS, and Linux platforms.

title: Monorepos in Dart
description: Managing complex projects with Melos to scale huge codebases efficiently.

title: Supabase Realtime Database
description: Build real-time chat applications utilizing PostgreSQL's powerful row level security.

title: Flutter Architecture Masterclass
description: Defining clean architecture principles and layer separation for ten-year codebases.

title: Flutter Beyond Mobile
description: Strategies for taking your mobile codebase and deploying it smoothly to web and desktop platforms.

title: Advanced Dart Types
description: Mastering generics, type aliases, and the new records and patterns in Dart 3.

title: Scaling State with Riverpod
description: Best practices for modular architecture when relying exclusively on Riverpod for state management.

title: Serverless Functions with Firebase
description: Write custom backend logic triggered by Flutter app events using Firebase Cloud Functions.

title: Material 3 Design Systems
description: Implement complete, dynamic Material 3 design tokens into your Flutter application seamlessly.
